## What this changes

<One or two sentences.>

## Why

<The problem it solves or the gap it fills. Reference an issue if relevant: "fixes #12".>

## How

<Implementation approach. Any non-obvious decisions worth calling out.>

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires version bump + CHANGELOG entry)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Pattern file addition

## Testing

<How you tested this. If it's a hook change, include the mocked stdin and observed stdout.>

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added under Unreleased
- [ ] No new external dependencies in hooks (stdlib only)
- [ ] Tested on at least one of: macOS, Linux, Windows
- [ ] Preserved the "hooks for enforcement, skills for suggestions" principle
